signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell Warns Trump's Tariffs Will Raise Inflation and Slow GDP Growth in Major Speech | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Warns Trump's Tariffs Will Raise Inflation and Slow GDP Growth in Major Speech | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Jerome Powell delivered a speech on April 16, 2025, at the Economic Club of Chicago, stating that announced tariff increases are "significantly larger than anticipated" and will cause higher inflation and slower growth, with heightened downside risks to the economy[1][4][5].
